decks.notes: The main objective of this deck is to combo off using artifacts and Emry, Lurker of the Loch's ability to cast artifacts from the graveyard. The deck includes a variety of low-cost artifacts to help fuel Emry's ability, as well as key pieces such as Paradox Engine and Urza, Lord High Artificer to generate mana and create a win condition. The deck aims to control the board using counterspells and disruptive artifacts like Ensnaring Bridge and Pithing Needle, while also using cards like Tezzeret the Seeker and Whir of Invention to tutor for combo pieces. Overall, the deck focuses on assembling a powerful artifact-based combo to win the game efficiently in a Duel Commander 1 vs 1 format.

The main strategy of this deck is to focus on aggressive play style by utilizing the abilities of Quintorius, History Chaser and a variety of low-cost creatures and spells to quickly build a board presence and overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes a mix of removal spells, mana acceleration, and protection to ensure that the aggressive strategy can be executed effectively. The deck also includes multiple ways to generate value through recursion and card advantage, allowing for sustained pressure on the opponent. With a focus on aggression and tempo, the deck aims to put constant pressure on the opponent and close out the game quickly before they have a chance to stabilize.

The deck focuses on utilizing efficient mana ramp creatures like Arbor Elf and Elvish Mystic alongside powerful pump spells like Berserk and Scale Up to quickly build a threatening board presence. Tifa Lockhart's ability to double the damage dealt by creatures makes these pump spells even more potent, allowing for explosive turns and overwhelming attacks. The deck also includes protection spells like Blossoming Defense and Snakeskin Veil to keep Tifa Lockhart safe from removal spells or other disruptive effects. By combining aggressive creatures with powerful pump spells and protection, the deck aims to apply pressure early and often, forcing opponents to react quickly or risk being overrun by Tifa Lockhart's formidable forces.

This deck revolves around using the aggressive strategy of attacking quickly and dealing direct damage to the opponent in order to win the game as fast as possible. Zurgo Bellstriker is the commander, providing a strong aggressive creature to lead the charge. The deck is filled with low-cost and efficient spells and creatures that can deal damage directly to the opponent or remove threats on the board. With a focus on burn spells, efficient creatures, and aggressive tactics, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their own game plan. By applying pressure early and continuously, the deck aims to close out the game swiftly and decisively.

The deck revolves around utilizing a variety of protective and enchantment cards to both protect your creatures and empower them with auras and equipment. The main strategy is to build up a strong board presence with creatures such as Light-Paws, Emperor's Voice and Kor Spiritdancer, while also disrupting your opponent's game plan with cards like Containment Priest and Curse of Silence. By using cards like Ethereal Armor and Cartouche of Solidarity, you can quickly buff up your creatures and overwhelm your opponent. The deck also includes a selection of removal and disruption spells like Swords to Plowshares and Orim's Chant to control the board and ensure your combo can go off successfully.

The deck focuses on leveraging the commander Lumra's ability to ramp and accelerate the deck's mana production, allowing for explosive plays and big creatures to overwhelm the opponent quickly. With a heavy emphasis on land-based ramp spells like Exploration and Burgeoning, as well as tutor effects like Green Sun's Zenith and Sylvan Scrying, the deck aims to quickly ramp into powerful threats like Primeval Titan and Emrakul, the Promised End. The deck also includes disruption and protection in cards like Sylvan Safekeeper and Thought-Knot Seer to help control the game and protect key cards. Overall, the deck aims to quickly ramp into powerful threats and overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive game plan.

The deck is focused on aggressive plays and utilizing the commander's abilities to deal damage efficiently. It includes a mix of powerful creatures with abilities that trigger upon dealing combat damage or entering the battlefield. The deck also features a variety of removal spells to clear the way for the commander and other creatures to attack. The mana base is constructed to support the aggressive strategy, with a good mix of lands that produce red and white mana. Overall, the deck aims to apply pressure early in the game and maintain it until the opponent is overwhelmed and defeated.

The deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and spells to control the board and pressure opponents early in the game. Plagon, Lord of the Beach serves as the commander, providing a powerful and resilient threat. The deck includes a variety of low-cost creatures and disruptive spells to maintain tempo and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Cards like Aang, Swift Savior and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd support the aggressive strategy, while cards like Counterspell and Swords to Plowshares provide versatility and control options. Overall, the deck aims to apply early pressure while maintaining control of the game through disruption and efficient creatures, creating a challenging and dynamic play experience for both players.
